issues.sample: My 2021 Ford Edge SEL with 22,000 miles on it, bought new less than 2 years ago, would intermittently show a warning notification on the dash saying “AWD temporarily disabled”. The car drove different when the warning came on. It was slow to accelerate and more difficult to turn.

narrative.headline: What 2021 Ford Edge owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 93 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Power Train (30% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
